@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber

participant "PicYaPaletteActivity" as PicYaPaletteActivity
participant "ImageChooserActivity" as ImageChooserActivity
participant "SettingsActivity" as SettingsActivity

PicYaPaletteActivity -> PicYaPaletteActivity : onCreate
PicYaPaletteActivity -> ImageChooserActivity : startActivity
ImageChooserActivity -> ImageChooserActivity : openSettings
ImageChooserActivity -> SettingsActivity : startActivity
SettingsActivity -> SettingsActivity : savePreferences
SettingsActivity --> ImageChooserActivity : 
ImageChooserActivity --> PicYaPaletteActivity : 

@enduml
